description:
This endpoint creates or updates a batch of Direct Cost Items.
See [Using Sync Actions](/documentation/using-sync-actions) for additional information.

Note: In addition to the values documented below for the **direct_cost_type** attribute, an enum value of `subcontractor_invoice` is also allowed. To enable this feature in the Procore web application, contact [apisupport@procore.com](mailto:apisupport@procore.com).
This action does not support concurrent requests. If there is an attempt to up...

employee.description: Employee tied to the Direct Cost Item

invoice_number.description: Unique identifier for a Direct Cost Item of type invoice

terms.description: The agreed upon Terms for the date of payment

updates.description: An array of Direct Cost Items

id.description: ID of the Direct Cost Item to update. Required when updating a direct cost item.

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code. Only validated and persisted when object level multicurrency is enabled.

currency_exchange_rate.description: Currency Exchange Rate. Only validated and persisted when object level multicurrency is enabled.

invoice_number.description: Unique identifier for a Direct Cost Item of type invoice. Is required only if `direct_cost_type` is set to `invoice`.

terms.description: The agreed upon Terms for the date of payment

vendor_id.description: Vendor ID. Is required only if `direct_cost_type` is set to `invoice`.

direct_cost_type.description: Type. Note:  Can only be set when creating a direct cost item. Required when creating a direct cost item.
